scripts.db:apply:local: wrangler d1 execute lokal-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute lokal-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute lokal-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_extras.sql
scripts.db:apply:remote: wrangler d1 execute lokal-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute lokal-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute lokal-db --remote --file=./migrations/0003_extras.sql
